title: Aethermons
description: Allows for a few Pokemon (including Ultra Beasts and Legendaries) to spawn in The Aether.
body:
Adds these Pokemon to the spawn pool in the Aether dimension:

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b4fa2f0a00ddf41065ba2504cf0f715c2d2df25.png)

**THIS MOD DOES NOT ADD MODELS FOR THESE POKEMONS, USE RESOURCE PACKS THAT DO TO NOT VIEW THE POKEMON AS SUBSTITUTES**

How to install:

Go to your singleplayer/server folder, go to world, datapacks, and put this zip there. Do /reload in chat with OP permissions and/or restart the server/close and reopen the game.
